articles.title: Known results and all info from the Warm-Up Challenge online competition!
articles.snippet: 4-time GC Champion in the Scarlet & Violet era Joji Kaieda has won the first Pokémon Champions online competition! He used a Mega Charizard Y team to finish at a rating of 2024, ahead of 2023 Worlds…

articles.title: Battles in the Warm-Up Challenge online competition are live. Sign-ups are still open!
articles.snippet: The first Pokémon Champions online competition lasts until 13 April at 02:00 UTC and features the double-battles Regulation Set M-A, to be used for VGC starting next month!

articles.title: A new wave of the Emboar the Unrivaled 7★ Tera Raid Battle event is live!
articles.snippet: This Tera Raid Battle event lasts until 16 April. Emboar the Unrivaled was last featured in June 2024, so take this chance to catch it if you didn't back then!

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Campinas Regional are open again!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Campinas Regional Championships, one of the major VGC events in Latin America, held on 16–17 May 2026!

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Prague Regional are open again!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Prague Regional Championships, one of the major VGC events in Europe, held on 25–26 April 2026!

articles.title: Pokemon Presents February 2026
articles.snippet: Tune in for exciting Pokemon news and announcements.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Paldean Fates Now Available
articles.snippet: The latest Pokemon TCG expansion featuring Shiny Pokemon is now available at retailers.

articles.title: Pokemon Scarlet and Violet DLC: The Indigo Disk
articles.snippet: Explore the Terarium and encounter legendary Pokemon.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Prismatic Evolutions Announced
articles.snippet: A special expansion featuring Terastal Pokemon coming January 2025.

articles.title: Pokemon Legends: Z-A Coming 2026
articles.snippet: The next Pokemon RPG set in the Kalos region announced.
